title: Jovan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jovan''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Jovan]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[lieutenant]]
*The '''[[Jovan system]]''', a [[star system]] located near the [[Yavin system]]

==Legends==
*The '''[[Jovan system/Legends|Jovan system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]]
**'''[[Jovan III]]''', an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
**'''[[Jovan Station]]''', in orbit around the world
*'''[[Jovan Drark]]''', a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
*'''[[Jovan Vharing]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]

{{Disambig}}
